risk_if_not_implemented: Without Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) Security, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Transmission Confidentiality
compensating_control_1.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality of data being transmitted.
compensating_control_1.justification: Transmission Confidentiality (CRY-03) provides cryptographic protection that compensates for the absence of Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) Security (EMB-11) by ensuring data confidentiality and integrity through alternative technical means. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Access Enforcement
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to enforce Logical Access Control (LAC) permissions that conform to the principle of "least privilege."
compensating_control_2.justification: Access Enforcement (IAC-20) provides access control enforcement that compensates for the absence of Message Queuing Telemetry Transport (MQTT) Security (EMB-11) by restricting system and data access to authorized users through alternative identity and access mechanisms. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
